title: Nova Bank starts core banking modernization program
externalFact: Nova Bank announced a multi-year core banking modernization program focused on digital services and branch operations.
excerpt: The program will update digital services and branch operations platforms.

title: Nova Bank opens digital operations center
externalFact: Nova Bank opened a digital operations center to coordinate application monitoring and incident response.
excerpt: The new center coordinates monitoring and incident response work.

title: Cascade Health expands clinical data platform
externalFact: Cascade Health reported an expansion of its clinical data platform across three hospitals.
excerpt: The expansion covers clinical data workflows across three hospitals.

title: Metro Transit Authority posts fare system RFI
externalFact: Metro Transit Authority posted a request for information for a fare system modernization assessment.
excerpt: The RFI asks respondents to describe modernization assessment approaches.

title: Pioneer Utilities funds grid security program
externalFact: Pioneer Utilities approved funding for a grid security and monitoring program.
excerpt: The approved funding covers monitoring and security work for grid operations.

title: Summit Retail Group refreshes store systems
externalFact: Summit Retail Group described a store systems refresh covering inventory, point-of-sale, and analytics tools.
excerpt: The refresh covers inventory, point-of-sale, and analytics tools.

title: Summit Retail Group store systems refresh noted by local outlet
externalFact: A local outlet also reported Summit Retail Group's store systems refresh.
excerpt: The local report repeats the store systems refresh details.

title: Horizon Manufacturing adds factory edge pilot
externalFact: Horizon Manufacturing said it added an edge computing pilot at two production facilities.
excerpt: The pilot covers two production facilities.

title: Lakeview Insurance publishes compliance operations brief
externalFact: Lakeview Insurance published a compliance operations brief that references manual evidence collection workflows.
excerpt: The brief references manual evidence collection workflows.

title: Redwood Logistics completes dispatch platform migration
externalFact: Redwood Logistics completed a dispatch platform migration to a managed cloud service.
excerpt: The dispatch platform migration is complete.

title: Silverline Media launches regional studio
externalFact: Silverline Media launched a regional studio for short-form content production.
excerpt: The studio supports short-form content production.

title: Terra Foods starts supplier traceability update
externalFact: Terra Foods started a supplier traceability update for packaged goods operations.
excerpt: The update focuses on supplier traceability.

title: Valley Air updates summer flight schedule
externalFact: Valley Air published an updated summer flight schedule for three regional routes.
excerpt: The schedule update covers three regional routes.
